{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Naru Gwei and Naru Saeya
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Gwei and Naru Saeya]] possess powerful wind madra.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
